title: Better Effects
description: A mod that adds new particle effects for vanilla features
body:
# Better Effects
This mod adds **7 overpowerful visual effects** for Minecraft. It was created for a YouTube video and published here so fans can download it.

## Effects :
* **TNT** : Explode like a **nuclear bomb** and destroy everything close to it (50 blocks).
* **Ender Pearl** : Spawn a **purple shockwave** on hit.
* **End Crystal** : Spawn a **pentagram** and a **circular beam** on explode.
* **Ander Pearl** : Spawn a **rift leading** to a **red world** where the **player cannot escape unless he dies**.
* **Shooting Stars** : At **night, shooting stars** will start appearing **above the player**.
* **Boat** : Spawn a **rainbow streak** when ridded by a player.
* **Netherite Hoe** : Spawn an **orbital strike** when used on the ground.

## Other information :
* The only supported version of Minecraft is **1.20.1**.
* Make sure to download the **Fabric API**  _(for example Version 0.92.2+1.20.1 works)_
